violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. The first prep cooler on the line is maintaining temperatures from 42-45 F

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. An employees hat was stored on a shelf with single use containers.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. The first prep cooler on the line is maintaining temperatures of 42 - 45 F.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration of 50 ppm.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use bags were stored on the floor in the baking area.
